past_challenges.raw: My first semester I completely underestimated how much harder college coursework would be compared to high school. I was juggling five classes, barely sleeping, and failing to keep up with readings. I had to completely rebuild my study habits from scratch.

I had zero time management skills freshman year and kept procrastinating until deadlines were right on top of me. I started using a planner and time-blocking my calendar halfway through the semester and it honestly changed everything.
